---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with the extension itself
labels: bug
---

### Before you continue

This template is for problems in the Pinboard Pin browser extension itself.

This project is in feature freeze. Please do not use this form for feature requests unless the change would be very small and straightforward.

### Check whether this is a Pinboard service issue

Symptoms such as these are often caused by problems on the Pinboard side rather than in this extension:

- **"Cannot check this page on Pinboard"**
- **Tags are missing or slow to load**
- **Saving a bookmark takes forever**

If the Pinboard website or API is currently failing, please contact **support@pinboard.in** instead. This extension is a third-party tool and is not maintained by Pinboard.

- [ ] I have confirmed the Pinboard website is actually working.
- [ ] I can load https://api.pinboard.in/v1/posts/recent properly in the browser.
- [ ] I understand this extension is a third-party tool and not part of the Pinboard company.
- [ ] I believe this issue is caused by the extension itself.
